title: [ExportVerilog] Assignment from singed expression to unsigned wires

features.name: signed_expression_to_unsigned_wire_assignment
features.description: Code should include a $signed expression being assigned to an unsigned wire declaration where the wire lacks explicit signed keyword

features.name: signed_right_shift_to_unsigned_wire
features.description: Code should include a signed right shift operation ($signed(a) >>> b) being assigned to an unsigned wire

features.name: signed_right_shift_result_bit_extract
features.description: Code should include bit extraction from a signed right shift result assigned to an unsigned wire, where the extracted bit index depends on the shift amount
